picklistValues.label: Spouse or child of Japanese national
Spouse or Child of Permanent Resident

calculatedFormula:
IF(
				NOT(ISBLANK( PersonBirthdate )),
				FLOOR(( TODAY() - PersonBirthdate ) / 365.2425),
				IF(
								NOT(ISBLANK( BirthDate__c )),
								FLOOR(( TODAY() - BirthDate__c ) / 365.2425),
								0
				)
)
label: 年齢
name: age__c

calculatedFormula:
IF(
  OR(
				ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "日本"),
				ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "無国籍"),
    ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "パキスタン"),
    ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "スリランカ"),
    ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "ウズベキスタン"),

    /* 対象外の在留資格（特定活動以外） */
				ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "その他"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "公用"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "外交"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "興行"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "研修"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "定住者"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "技能実習"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "短期滞在"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "特別永住者"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "日本人の配偶者"),
				ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "日本人の配偶者等"),
    ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "永住者の配偶者等"),

    /* 特定活動かつ国が韓国・台湾・香港以外 */
    AND(
      ISPICKVAL(visa_type__pc, "特定活動"),
      NOT(
        OR(
          ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "韓国"),
          ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "台湾"),
          ISPICKVAL( country__pc , "香港")
        )
      )
    ),

    /* 年齢が18歳未満 */
      age__c < 18
  ),
  "対象外",
  "対象"
)
label: EPOSメルマガ専用
name: epos_maga_mail__c
